# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  MySQSQueue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600  # 4 days
      VisibilityTimeout: 30

  MySNSTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
    Properties:
      DisplayName: 'MyServerlessSNSTopic'

  MyQueuePolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy'
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MySQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 'SQS:SendMessage'
              - 'SQS:ReceiveMessage'
              - 'SQS:DeleteMessage'
              - 'SQS:GetQueueAttributes'
              - 'SQS:GetQueueUrl'
            Resource: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn

  SNSSubscription:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Subscription'
    Properties:
      Protocol: 'sqs'
      TopicArn: !Ref MySNSTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt MySQSQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueURL:
    Description: 'URL of the created SQS Queue'
    Value: !Ref MySQSQueue

  TopicARN:
    Description: 'ARN of the created SNS Topic'
    Value: !Ref MySNSTopic
